/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/tests/unit_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/core/cache_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/persistence/file_persistence.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/core/memory_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/core/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/net/resp_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/cluster/slot_map.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/cluster/cluster_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/metrics/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/miniredis_unit_tests.dir/src/server/command_handler.cpp.o -o miniredis_unit_tests  -lpthread
